/usr/bin/g++ -fopenmp CMakeFiles/tensor_test.dir/test_tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_test.dir/test_nn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_test.dir/test_rope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_test.dir/test_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_test.dir/test_quant.cpp.o -o tensor_test  ../libtensor_lib.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../lib/libgtest.a
